creator: thomas.dreibholz@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 206531
The shar file

The package socketapi has been missing in the FreeBSD ports. Therefore, I have created a port.

SocketAPI is the socket API library for the SCTPLIB user-space SCTP implementation. 

Homepage of socketapi: https://www.uni-due.de/~be0001/sctplib/

Fix: The shar file socketapi-2.2.16.shar is attached.
